tasks.title: Open GitHub issue
tasks.notes: Issue #220 opened on Apra-Labs/apra-fleet with full repro details including 5 failing cases and suspected source PR #97

tasks.title: Reproduction test proving path.posix.resolve bug
tasks.notes: Created tests/sftp-path-resolution.test.ts with 7 test cases demonstrating the bug. All tests pass.

tasks.title: Bisect + root cause documentation
tasks.notes: Root cause: commit aa9605f (PR #65) introduced path.posix.resolve bug. Feature gap, not regression from PR #97. Diagnosis and classification in feedback.md.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 1 — Root Cause
tasks.notes: Build: PASS (npm run build clean). Tests: PASS (61 files, 1014 tests). GH issue #220 created. Reproduction test passing. Root cause identified: commit aa9605f (PR #65) introduced path.posix.resolve bug.

tasks.title: Implement fix in sftp.ts + platform.ts
tasks.notes: Added resolveRemotePath() to platform.ts. Replaced both path.posix.resolve calls in sftp.ts (uploadViaSFTP line 68, downloadViaSFTP line 109). Cleaned up workFolderPosix locals. Build clean, all 1014 tests pass.

tasks.title: Cross-OS file transfer test matrix (G1)
tasks.notes: Created tests/file-transfer-matrix.test.ts with 20 tests: resolveRemotePath unit tests, Linux→remote Linux (SFTP), Linux→remote Windows SFTP (all 5 repro cases from issue #220), regression guard, Windows→* TODO markers. All pass.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 2 — Fix + Tests
tasks.notes: Build: PASS (npm run build clean). Tests: PASS (62 files, 1034 tests, 5 skipped). resolveRemotePath handles all path styles. Matrix covers Linux→Linux and Linux→Windows SFTP. All 5 repro cases from issue #220 pass. Pushed to origin/bug_fix/file-transfer-windows.

tasks.title: tests/README.md documenting the matrix (G2)
tasks.notes: Created tests/README.md with cross-OS matrix explanation, sftp.ts path resolution incident (GH #220) as cautionary tale, and PR coverage rule for file-transfer code changes.

tasks.title: Update project CLAUDE.md — File Transfer Tools (G3)
